Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Emma E. Nelson-Munson, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for Plaintiffs / moving parties Howard McCoy, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS LOUISA KEOSEYAN MCCOY, ET AL.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274930 and 275696 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 274930. One order for both cases was signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
